headline: Middle East Trade Surges 35% to RM82 Billion for Malaysia
context: Malaysia trade with Middle East grew 35% to RM82 billion in 2025 driven by energy cooperation and halal exports.

cards.big: Malaysia-Middle East trade surged 35% to RM82 billion in 2025
cards.sub: Energy cooperation and halal exports drive deepening partnership

cards.big: Saudi Arabia became 6th largest trading partner at RM28 billion
cards.sub: Petronas secured 3 new petroleum agreements with Saudi Aramco

cards.big: Halal exports to Middle East reached RM18.5 billion up 42% from 2023
cards.sub: UAE alone imported RM4.8 billion in Malaysian halal food and pharma

cards.big: Khazanah raised RM4.2 billion in Gulf sukuk in 2025
cards.sub: Islamic finance positions Malaysia as key intermediary for Middle East-ASEAN capital

cards.big: Trade growth tests whether economic partnership translates into diplomatic influence
RM82 billion Middle East trade surge — diversification reduces dependence but introduces new geopolitical exposures.
